message.content:
@startuml
actor "Main" as Main
rectangle "YAMLConfiguration" as YAMLConfiguration
rectangle "BufParser" as BufParser
rectangle "DataContainer" as DataContainer
rectangle "IodaEncoder" as IodaEncoder

Main -> YAMLConfiguration : YAMLConfiguration(confPath)
Main -> BufParser : BufParser(conf)
Main -> BufParser : parse
BufParser -> DataContainer : DataContainer()
DataContainer --> Main : dataContainer
Main -> IodaEncoder : IodaEncoder(conf)
Main -> IodaEncoder : encode(dataContainer)

note right of BufParser : See Query Collecting Data sequence.
note right of IodaEncoder : See Query Getting Data sequence.
@enduml
